pi_items.source: Hardcoded in export_result.sh as EXP_FILE and checked by verifier.py
Hardcoded in export_result.sh as COND_FILE and checked by verifier.py
Checked in export_result.sh via the 'required' set, although leniency allows matching at least 2 out of 3.
Checked in export_result.sh by looking for '-0.7' in the position string

privileged_info_summary: The task strictly requires creating an experiment file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/mouse_tracking.psyexp and a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/competitors.csv. The conditions file must contain at least 4 rows and include the columns 'target_word', 'distractor_word', and 'correct_side' (with the script requiring at least 2 of these to pass). The experiment must include a start routine with a button positioned at a y-coordinate of -0.7.
